name: Kennesaw Mountain Pawn
description_short: Full-service pawn shop in Marietta, GA specializing in jewelry, coins, gold, firearms, and electronics. Offers pawn loans, buying, and selling services since 2012.
description_long:
Kennesaw Mountain Pawn is a pawn shop located at 1200 Cobb Parkway North in Marietta, Georgia, established in 2012. The business operates as a community-focused collateral lending and retail operation serving the greater Marietta area. The company positions itself around principles of respect, integrity, and customer service, emphasizing fair transactions and relationship-building with customers.

The shop offers a comprehensive range of pawn services including collateral-based loans, gold appraisal and trading, rare coin buying and selling, antique firearms, modern guns and ammunition, jewelry (both vintage and contemporary), and electronics and tools. They accept various items as collateral for pawn loans and provide what they describe as straightforward terms. The business operates as both a lender (accepting items as loan collateral) and a retailer (buying and selling merchandise across multiple categories).

Kennesaw Mountain Pawn distinguishes itself through emphasis on transparent appraisal processes, fair valuations, and customer service quality. The website highlights staff professionalism, quick appraisal turnaround, and a curated merchandise selection. Customer testimonials on their website consistently reference stress-free transactions, fair offers, and welcoming atmosphere. The company specifically calls attention to expertise in gold and coin appraisal and antique firearms knowledge.

As a pawn shop, this business model inherently involves collateral-based lending with redemption terms, which differs from traditional personal loans. Customer reviews are uniformly positive on the platform, though this reflects only self-reported testimonials. The business maintains standard retail hours (Monday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 9:30am-2pm, closed Sunday) and can be reached at (770) 315-5020.
address: 1200 Cobb Pkwy N Suite #200, Marietta, GA 30062

company_info.headquarters: 1200 Cobb Pkwy N Suite #200, Marietta, GA 30062

pros: Offers pawn loans with fair terms and transparent appraisal process according to customer testimonials
Diverse merchandise selection including specialized categories (antique guns, rare coins, gold) with expert appraisal
Quick appraisal and transaction process noted specifically in customer reviews
Open Saturday mornings (9:30am-2pm) providing weekend access unlike many service providers
Specializes in high-value items (jewelry, firearms, coins, gold) with stated expertise in accurate valuations
Community-focused business model with emphasis on customer relationships and repeat clientele
Accepts wide variety of collateral types (jewelry, electronics, tools, collectibles)
cons: Pawn loans require collateral surrender and redemption within terms; not suitable for customers wanting unsecured credit
Limited business hours (closes at 5pm weekdays, 2pm Saturdays) may be inconvenient for working professionals
Gun sales require federal firearms licensing and background checks, limiting accessibility compared to other merchandise categories
No information provided about interest rates, redemption periods, or specific loan terms on website
All testimonials on website appear to be company-provided with 5-star ratings, lacking independent review verification
best_for: Individuals needing short-term collateral loans for cash without credit checks
Sellers of jewelry, coins, gold, firearms, or electronics seeking fair market valuations and quick payment
Collectors and enthusiasts of antique firearms, rare coins, or vintage jewelry interested in buying or trading
Community members in Marietta, GA seeking local pawn services with established reputation
diagnosis: Kennesaw Mountain Pawn is best for individuals who own high-value items (jewelry, firearms, electronics, coins) and either need quick cash via collateral loans or want to sell items for fair value. The main caveat is that pawn loans are short-term, collateral-dependent products requiring redemption within set terms—not a substitute for traditional personal loans or credit-building solutions.
services: Pawn loans accepting jewelry, electronics, tools, coins, and other items as collateral
Gold buying, selling, and pawning with expert appraisal
Rare and collectible coin trading and appraisal
Antique firearms sales with historical documentation
Jewelry buying, selling, and pawning (vintage and contemporary pieces)
Item appraisal services for pawn and purchase valuations
Buy/sell transactions across all merchandise categories
meta_description: Kennesaw Mountain Pawn in Marietta, GA offers pawn loans and purchases for jewelry, coins, gold, firearms, and electronics.
